scripts.setup: ADB_HOST_PORT=$CONDUCTOR_PORT devcontainer up --workspace-folder . && devcontainer exec --workspace-folder . make deps && devcontainer exec --workspace-folder . make dev_db && devcontainer exec --workspace-folder . bash -lc 'adb seed activists'
scripts.run: ADB_HOST_PORT=$CONDUCTOR_PORT devcontainer up --workspace-folder . && devcontainer exec --workspace-folder . --remote-env PORT=$CONDUCTOR_PORT bash -lc 'fuser -k ${PORT}/tcp 3000/tcp 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; make run_all'
